1.full_eval_program:
Predict(StringSignature(text -> label
    instructions='Classify the given text into one of these categories: B, C, D, E, F, G, I, J, K. Answer with the category name only.'
    text = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'IS_TYPE_UNDEFINED': True, '__dspy_field_type': 'input', 'prefix': 'Text:', 'desc': '${text}'})
    label = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'__dspy_field_type': 'output', 'prefix': 'Label:', 'desc': '${label}'})
))

6.full_eval_program:
Predict(StringSignature(text -> label
    instructions='You are an expert in interpreting SVG graphics and mapping them to geometric shapes. Given a text description of an SVG path and a set of labeled shape options, analyze the SVG path commands and determine which shape the path represents.     label = Field(annotation=str required=True json_schema_extra={'__dspy_field_type': 'output', 'prefix': 'Label:', 'desc': '${label}'})
))
